name: diagram
description: Mermaid diagram as the slide's centerpiece.
purpose: Use for relational/topological visuals — flowcharts, sequence diagrams, state machines, ER diagrams. The diagram should occupy ≥50% of the slide.

title.description: Slide heading framing what the diagram shows.

mermaid.description: Fenced ```mermaid block, pre-rendered to SVG at build time.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: diagram -->

## How signals move from input to decision.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  A[Input] --> B[Process]
  B --> C{Decision}
  C -->|yes| D[Path A]
  C -->|no| E[Path B]
```
